heroBanner.title: With a focus on health, and with technology as the foundation, we pursue our dreams.
descriptions: From the conceptual design of the product to the precise manufacturing process, we always take 'accuracy' as the highest principle. Every structure, every material, and every process has been meticulously examined and repeatedly verified, solely to ensure that at critical moments on the operating table and in the clinic, we can truly safeguard the life and health of patients, and provide doctors with greater confidence in their profession, which is more solid and reliable.

We are committed to developing high-performance and highly stable medical device products. With rigorous data support, rapid response speed and consistent stable performance, we provide efficient and precise technical assistance for clinical diagnosis and treatment processes. This enables doctors to quickly obtain key information in complex medical environments and make more scientific and accurate judgments, thereby improving the overall quality of diagnosis and treatment.

featuredProducts.title: Featured Products
featuredProducts.description: Explore our selection of high-quality medical devices, supporting every critical moment in clinical diagnosis and treatment.

latestNews.title: The Latest
latestNews.description: Real-time collection of regulatory updates, policy interpretations and centralized procurement information in the medical device industry, helping industry practitioners grasp key information at the earliest possible time.

product.title: Products
product.description-2: Covering the complete treatment process for many diseases around the world

category.name: Nursing & Patient Transfer
category.description: Provides comprehensive solutions for patient movement, positioning, and nursing assistance. Designed to reduce the workload of caregivers while enhancing safety and comfort during patient transfers in wards, emergency departments, and operating rooms.

category.name: Anesthesia & Airway Management
category.description: Essential devices for establishing, securing, and maintaining a clear airway during surgery and emergency care. These products emphasize speed, safety, and stability, ensuring reliable performance throughout anesthesia and respiratory support procedures.

category.name: Surgery & Endoscopy
category.description: Covers a wide range of disposable instruments and auxiliary tools used in open and minimally invasive procedures, including cutting, puncture, drainage, and tissue handling. Products focus on precision, convenience, and minimally invasive operation to support surgeons effectively.

category.name: Proctology Instruments
category.description: Designed for the clinical treatment of hemorrhoids, anal fissures, and other anorectal conditions. These instruments are simple, safe, and easy to operate, improving efficiency in both outpatient and surgical workflows while supporting various minimally invasive techniques.

category.name: Urology Instruments
category.description: Dedicated to the diagnosis and treatment of urinary system diseases. This category includes tools for urinary management, tissue handling, and minimally invasive procedures. Products prioritize comfort, reliability, and non-invasiveness to meet the diverse needs of urology practices.

featured.name: Disposable Circumcision Stapler - Innovative Version
featured.description: The main function of the circumcision stapler is to replace traditional manual suturing. It automatically completes the anastomosis while removing excess foreskin through the synergistic action of the built-in circular knife and anastomotic nails. Its design simulates the principle of a stapler, using titanium or stainless steel nails to fix the tissue, ensuring a tight and appropriately tight anastomosis, reducing postoperative bleeding and infection risks. For example, the circumcision stapler controls the cutting depth by adjusting the knob, and achieves safe and controllable surgical operation with the insurance block and movable handle.

featured.name: Disposable Circumcision Stapler - Standard Version
featured.description: The main function of the circumcision stapler is to replace traditional manual suturing. It automatically completes the anastomosis while removing excess foreskin through the synergistic action of the built-in circular knife and anastomotic nails. Its design simulates the principle of a stapler, using titanium or stainless steel nails to fix the tissue, ensuring a tight and appropriately tight anastomosis, reducing postoperative bleeding and infection risks. For example, the circumcision stapler controls the cutting depth by adjusting the knob, and achieves safe and controllable surgical operation with the insurance block and movable handle.

featured.name: Disposable Trocar Instruments
featured.description: Disposable laparoscopic trocars and sets are specialized instruments used to establish surgical access channels during laparoscopic surgery. The product creates a passage through the abdominal wall with the puncture head, allowing laparoscopes and surgical instruments to enter the abdominal cavity smoothly. This product is suitable for various endoscopic surgeries in general surgery, gynecology, urology, and other fields. It is a single-use medical device that avoids infection risks caused by repeated sterilization, improving surgical efficiency and safety.

featured.name: Disposable Hemorrhoid Ligator
featured.description: Disposable hemorrhoid ligators are minimally invasive surgical instruments specifically designed for the treatment of hemorrhoids. They use mechanical ligation and anastomosis techniques to precisely block the blood supply to hemorrhoidal tissue, promoting ischemic necrosis and natural shedding, while simultaneously restoring the normal anatomical structure of the anus. These instruments combine the dual functions of ligation and anastomosis, offering advantages such as ease of operation, minimal trauma, and rapid recovery. They are widely used in the treatment of internal hemorrhoids, mixed hemorrhoids, and certain rectal lesions.

featured.name: Patient Transfer Slide Sheet
featured.description: This product changes the traditional patient transfer (bed transfer) method, saving time and effort, being convenient and fast, and does not cause twisting of the patient's limbs, thereby avoiding surgical wound tearing, spinal injury, fracture end displacement, thrombosis shedding, and secondary injury caused by improper transfer methods.

featured.name: Endotracheal Tube Fixator
featured.description: An auxiliary device used to assist patients in opening their mouths during surgery or examination. It consists of a catheter fixator, a skin isolation pad, and an adjustable neck strap. The catheter fixator is made of polypropylene, the skin isolation pad is made of hydrocolloid material, and the adjustable neck strap is made of nylon webbing.

about.title: About US

heroBanner.title: The business covers 34 or more regions
heroBanner.subtitle: The business network covers major cities across the country and connects Shandong with other regions

descriptions: Jinan Jun Dao Xin Medical Devices Co., Ltd. was established in 2015. Since its inception, the company has been guided by the international advanced medical device research and development concepts, deeply engaged in the Chinese medical market, and continuously promoting technological innovation and industrial upgrading. The company has always attached great importance to the integrated development of industry, academia and research, and has established stable and in-depth cooperation mechanisms with many well-known domestic universities, research institutes and large tertiary hospitals. Through joint research and development, clinical verification, and technology transfer and other methods, it continuously enhances its technological innovation capabilities.

The company focuses on the high-end medical device field, with its product range covering key medical scenarios such as diagnosis, monitoring, and treatment, and is widely used in various departments including surgery, emergency care, critical care medicine, anesthesia, and rehabilitation. Relying on a professional R&D team, advanced manufacturing system, and strict quality management process, the company fully complies with domestic and international industry standards and has established a full life cycle quality control system from design, testing, mass production to after-sales service, ensuring that each product has high safety, stability, and clinical reliability.

Over the years, Jun Daoxin has consistently adhered to the development philosophy of 'enabling medical care through technology and safeguarding health through quality', providing medical staff with more scientific and efficient diagnostic tools, and bringing patients a safer and more comfortable treatment experience. In the future, the company will continue to promote technological innovation and industrial upgrading, providing more valuable medical device solutions for the industry, and helping China's medical cause to continue to progress.

new.title: News
new.description-1: Stay informed with real-time updates on medical device regulations, policy insights, and procurement developments
new.description-2: Authoritative announcements, standards, and reimbursement updates to help businesses navigate market and compliance changes

category.name: Regulatory Announcements
category.description: Provides timely updates on official notices, regulatory bulletins, and industry announcements issued by authorities. Helps organizations stay aligned with the latest compliance requirements and policy changes.

category.name: Regulations & Standards
category.description: Includes national and industry-level regulations, technical standards, and guidance documents for medical devices. Serves as a reliable reference for R&D, manufacturing, and regulatory teams to ensure full compliance.

category.name: Policy Insights & Industry Analysis
category.description: Offers professional interpretations of newly released policies along with in-depth industry insights. Helps companies understand policy impacts, identify key trends, and navigate the evolving regulatory landscape.

category.name: Procurement Updates & Tender Results
category.description: Covers centralized procurement announcements, bidding results, and procurement-related policy updates. Supports businesses in tracking market opportunities and preparing for tender participation with up-to-date information.

category.name: Reimbursement Policies & Fee Schedules
category.description: Provides updates on reimbursement policies, fee schedule changes, and medical insurance inclusion guidelines. Helps companies understand market access requirements and the financial implications of product reimbursement.

latest.title: The company successfully held the 2024 Medical Device Exhibition
latest.subject: Industry Event
latest.author: Nyh
latest.contentHtml:
From May 10 to May 12, 2024, our company successfully participated in the 2024 Medical Device Exhibition held at the National Convention and Exhibition Center (Shanghai). During the exhibition, we showcased our latest medical device products and technologies, attracting widespread attention from industry professionals and visitors.

At the exhibition booth, our professional team provided detailed explanations and demonstrations of our products, allowing visitors to gain a deeper understanding of our technological innovations and clinical applications. We also engaged in in-depth discussions with industry experts and potential partners, exploring opportunities for future collaboration.

This exhibition not only enhanced our company's brand influence in the medical device industry but also strengthened our connections with industry peers. We will continue to uphold our commitment to innovation and quality, providing better products and services to the medical community.

latest.title: New product obtained national medical device registration certificate
latest.subject: Product News
latest.author: Nyh
latest.contentHtml:
Our newly developed disposable foreskin cutting stapler successfully obtained the national medical device registration certificate, marking an important step forward for the company in the field of innovative medical devices.

This product is designed to replace traditional manual suturing methods, providing a more efficient and reliable solution for circumcision procedures. The stapler utilizes a built-in circular knife and anastomotic nails to automatically complete the anastomosis while removing excess foreskin, ensuring a tight and secure closure that reduces postoperative complications.

The successful registration of this product not only demonstrates our company's strong R&D capabilities but also reflects our commitment to providing high-quality medical devices that meet clinical needs. We will continue to focus on innovation and quality, striving to bring more advanced medical solutions to healthcare providers and patients.
